rationale: Educ. Code §45.151 defines terms for athletic stadium authorities. It contains no provisions related to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict exists.
quote:
Sec. 45.151. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "District" means any independent school district.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; it governs athletic stadium authority definitions only.
